user_system_path: Between rungs. The live product thread is the GUARDIAN (workday-presence): it fires, grounds a real commitment, and pings Slack only when it has a reviewable move. Recent shipped work: #402 (review-gated send), #404 (email draft attachments), #407 (the generator attaches its own work — write_document delivery carries the doc as a real file), #411 (Sources screen shows the real Microsoft email instead of the raw Azure guest UPN). The remaining money-loop moves are owner-gated: ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND is on — confirm RESEND_API_KEY in Vercel Production and connect a real source so a genuine write_document/send_message generates (the brain is in safe-silence now, so there is nothing to approve/send); configure the free external 15-min guardian cron; and (paid, needs a cost ceiling) teach the generator to compose + attach a companion document for a send_message. Constraint: NO paid API calls to test — prove in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: Between rungs — only control-plane + docs may change until the owner names the next seam (which re-scopes this contract).
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/schema/deps changes without an active seam + scoped contract.
acceptance_condition: Control plane is consistent in the between-rungs form (build-order active_issue: none, contract active_issue: none, no active-seam line in ACTIVE_HANDOFF) and gate:continuity passes.
stop_condition: Stop when the control plane is rolled forward to a clean between-rungs state and the owner has a boot prompt for the next session.
next_command: Owner: (1) open the Sources screen and confirm the Microsoft row reads b-kapp@outlook.com (validates #411); (2) confirm RESEND_API_KEY in Vercel Production and connect a real source so a genuine move generates, then approve it to validate the live attached send (#402/#404/#407); (3) configure the free external 15-min guardian cron. CODE candidate (needs owner go + paid budget): generator composes + attaches a companion document for a send_message.
